name: Horns & tracksuit-smooth sailing
description:
Another one of the sillies :) himestly just wanted to cook this up for a person that liked my ocs :) pls gimmie reviews, comments, things that I need to fix, etc! I hope you all are having a wonderful day/night! This is gonna be my last bot upload for a bit! Pls don’t expect more from me for a day or so!

Scenario: you, horns and tracksuit all go on a cruise, in which tracksuit is paying for you all.

Art creds: a screenshot taken in splatoon 3.
creator: gleebglorb
